discoverAgentsModal.title: Discover Gateway Agents
discoverAgentsModal.subtitle: Import existing agents from the OpenClaw Gateway
discoverAgentsModal.noAgentsFound: No agents found in the Gateway.
discoverAgentsModal.noAgentsHint: Make sure the OpenClaw Gateway is running and has agents configured.
discoverAgentsModal.failedConnect: Failed to connect to the server

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Reset all settings to defaults? This cannot be undone.
settings.workspacePathsDesc: Configure where Mission Control stores projects and deliverables.
settings.workspaceBasePathHelp: Base directory for all Mission Control files. Use ~ for home directory.
settings.projectsPathHelp: Directory where project folders are created. Each project gets its own folder.
settings.defaultProjectNameHelp: Default name for new projects. Can be changed per project.
settings.apiConfigDesc: Configure Mission Control API URL for agent orchestration.
settings.missionControlUrlHelp: URL where Mission Control is running. Auto-detected by default. Change for remote access.
settings.kanbanUXDesc: Tune board density and lane sizing behavior.
settings.kanbanCompactEmptyColumnsDesc: When enabled, empty Kanban columns shrink to header width while columns with tasks keep a wider, dynamic width.
settings.timezoneDesc: Control which time zone is used when displaying deliverables and system timestamps.
settings.timezoneHelp: Affects how timestamps are formatted in the Deliverables tab and other mission logs. File paths themselves remain unchanged.
settings.envVarsIntro: Some settings are also configurable via environment variables in
settings.envVarS3Backup: S3_ENDPOINT, S3_BUCKET, S3_ACCESS_KEY, S3_SECRET_KEY, S3_REGION — S3-compatible backup storage
settings.envVarsPrecedence: Environment variables take precedence over UI settings for server-side operations.
settings.backupIntro: Create on-demand backups of your SQLite database. Backups include a WAL checkpoint for consistency. Restoring always creates a safety backup of the current database first.
settings.backupEmpty: No backups yet. Click "Create Backup Now" to create your first backup.
settings.backupDeleteConfirm: Delete backup "{filename}"? This cannot be undone.
settings.backupS3ConfigIntroBefore: Configure S3-compatible storage (AWS S3, MinIO, Backblaze B2, etc.) for off-site backup storage. Set these values as environment variables in your
settings.backupS3FooterNote: When configured, backups will be automatically uploaded to S3 after creation. Credentials are stored server-side only — never in the browser.
settings.backupConfirmRestoreBody: This will create a safety backup of your current database, then restore from the selected backup. The application may need to be restarted after restoration.

activityPicker.title: Activity Dashboards
activityPicker.emptyDescription: Create a workspace to see agent activity.

agentDashboard.title: Agent Activity Dashboard
agentDashboard.noAgentsWorking: No agents currently marked as working.
agentDashboard.blockedIndicator: Blocked indicator: waiting in testing/review or offline with assigned work
agentDashboard.noRecentActivity: No recent activity for this agent.

dashboard.title: Mission Control
dashboard.allWorkspacesSubtitle: Select a workspace to view its mission queue and agents
dashboard.emptySubtitle: Create your first workspace to get started
dashboard.deleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
dashboard.deleteHasTasks: ⚠️ This workspace has {count} task(s). Delete them first.

notFoundPage.title: Page Not Found
notFoundPage.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.

workspacePage.notFoundDescription: The workspace "{slug}" doesn't exist or has been removed.

missionQueue.title: Mission Queue
missionQueue.assignedValidating: Assigned and validating — auto-start will move this to In Progress.
missionQueue.pipelineWarningBody: This task is currently {state}. Moving it manually will interrupt the automation pipeline and may cause the assigned agent to lose context. Are you sure you want to override?

taskModal.planningToggleDescription: Best for complex projects that need detailed requirements. You'll answer a few questions to define scope, goals, and constraints before work begins. Skip this for quick, straightforward tasks.
taskModal.planningStartDescription: I'll ask you a few questions to understand exactly what you need. All questions are multiple choice — just click to answer.
taskModal.planningCancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel planning? This will reset the planning state.
taskModal.planningOrchestratorWarning: The orchestrator is still processing. You can refresh safely — you will not lose your place in Planning Mode.
taskModal.planningOrchestratorTimeout: The orchestrator timed out after an extended wait. Please refresh the page and retry your last answer.
taskModal.teamAssignBelow: Assign agents below so the workflow can auto-handoff at each stage.
taskModal.activityDispatchedTo: Task dispatched to {agent} - Agent is now working on this task
taskModal.imagesEmpty: No images attached yet. Upload screenshots, designs, or other reference images here.

agentModal.modelHelp: AI model used by this agent. Leave empty to use OpenClaw default.
agentModal.fieldSoulPlaceholder: # Agent Name\n\nDefine this agent's personality, values, and communication style...
agentModal.fieldUserPlaceholder: # User Context\n\nInformation about the human this agent works with...
agentModal.fieldAgentsPlaceholder: # Team Roster\n\nInformation about other agents this agent works with...
agentModal.sessionKeyHelp: OpenClaw session routing prefix. Defaults to "agent:main:" if not set.

autopilotIndex.title: Product Autopilot
autopilotIndex.emptyDescription: Create your first product to start the autonomous development loop. Agents will research, ideate, and you swipe to decide what gets built.

autopilotNew.title: New Product
autopilotNew.helperRepoScan: Scan repo to auto-fill name & description from README
autopilotNew.titleScanRepo: Scan repo — auto-fill name & description from README
autopilotNew.helperSiteScan: Scan site to auto-fill name & description from website
autopilotNew.titleScanSite: Scan site — auto-fill name & description from website
autopilotNew.optionPlanFirst: Plan first — send to planning queue
autopilotNew.noRepoWarning: Without a repository, Autopilot can research and generate ideas but agents won't be able to build features or create pull requests.
autopilotNew.scanConnectFailed: Failed to connect to scan service
autopilotNew.repoVerifyFailed: Could not verify this repository. Make sure it exists and is accessible.
autopilotNew.repoVerifyDetailed: Could not verify this repository — it may be private or may not exist. Private repos work fine, the agent will use local access.
autopilotNew.importReadmeNotFound: No README.md found in this repository.
autopilotNew.programIntro: This document instructs the research and ideation agents. Describe your product, target users, priorities, and what you want the agents to focus on.
autopilotNew.programPlaceholder:
# Product Program: {name}

## Purpose
What this product does and who it's for.

## Target Users
Who uses this and what problems they have.

## Priorities
What matters most — growth, stability, features, UX, performance, etc.

## Research Directives
Specific areas to focus research on.

## Exclusions
Things you do NOT want suggested.
autopilotNew.schedulesIntro: These schedules run automatically. You can customize them later in product settings.

autopilotHealth.subtitle: Health Dashboard
autopilotHealth.compositeScore: Composite score based on {count} active components
autopilotHealth.noHistoricalData: No historical data yet — scores are snapshotted daily

autopilotBatchReview.ideasProcessedTitle: {count, plural, one {# idea processed!} other {# ideas processed!}}
autopilotBatchReview.successProcessed: Successfully processed {count, plural, one {# idea!} other {# ideas!}}
autopilotBatchReview.footerActionsAssigned: {actions} of {total, plural, one {# idea} other {# ideas}} have actions assigned
